title: NetSim
summary: 2-port inline network tester: traffic load-generator + tc netem WAN impairment emulator over the built-in LAN port + one USB-LAN adapter.
description: Turn a two-port CardputerZero (built-in LAN + one USB-LAN adapter) into a portable network lab. LOAD mode blasts self-timestamped frames out port A and receives them raw on port B, measuring one-way latency (min/avg/max), jitter, packet loss, duplication and reorder, plus a binary-search rate sweep that finds the loss-free maximum throughput of the device under test. IMPAIR mode bridges the two ports transparently (no IP needed) and shapes the pass-through traffic per direction with tc netem: delay, jitter, loss, duplicate, corrupt, reorder and rate limiting, with CCTV-tuned presets (Satellite, Congested, Lossy-wireless, Brownout, ...). Every ip/tc/nmcli command is shown in an on-device log. Designed for destructive testing of multicast RTP / MLIT CCTV streams.

en.title: NetSim
en.summary: 2-port inline network tester: traffic load-generator + tc netem WAN impairment emulator over the built-in LAN port + one USB-LAN adapter.

ja.title: NetSim
ja.summary: USB-LAN 2ポートで使うインライン型ネットワーク試験機。負荷試験(トラフィック生成+片方向遅延/ロス/スループット測定+レートスイープ)と、透過ブリッジ+tc netem による遅延/ジッタ/ロス/帯域制限の劣化注入(WANエミュレータ)。
